summary: Crystal‑clear audience recording that’s perfect for car listening.
review: Reviewers rave about this being the clearest AUD (audience) source ever captured of this show, noting its crispness and suitability for on‑the‑road listening. No musical performance details are given, but the high rating reflects strong appreciation of the audio quality.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, but it gives a perfect 5‑star rating and praises the recording as exceptionally clear; lacking performance info keeps confidence low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as the clearest audience (AUD) capture, very crisp and well‑balanced, especially good for car listening.
